title: Dimok government
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Government |image=[[File:Dimok_and_Ripoblus_representatives.jpg]] |name=Dimok government |type= |founding= |constitution= |headofstate= |headofgov= |commander= |executive= |legislative= |judicial= |military= |sector= |system= |celestialbody= |capital=[[Dimok/Legends|Dimok]]''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' |language= |currency= |religious= |holiday= |anthem= |formed= |established= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=[[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] }} {{Quote|You must understand, admiral, that we are at war with Ripoblus. We must have those arms…''"
"''And you will have them. But not before I receive payment in full. I'm sure the leaders of Ripoblus would be happy to pay in advance for Imperial weapons.''"
"''From what we've seen, they already have a supplier. You Imperials think you can do whatever you want. You may be surprised at what happens.''"
"''Just see that I get what's due. And don't waste your breath threatening me. There's nothing you or your government can do.|[[Unidentified Dimok representative|A Dimok representative]] and [[Harkov]]|}} The '''Dimok government''' was the ruling body of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dimok/Legends|Dimok]] and its [[Dimok (people)|people]]. The Dimok government opposed the [[Ripoblus government]] in the [[Sepan Civil War]] until the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Sepan campaign|intervened]][[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' ==Military== {{Quote|You have helped prevent the destruction of the Ripoblus convoy. In doing so a strong and clear signal has been sent to the Dimok leadership that the Empire will not tolerate any further aggressive actions from them.|[[Imperial briefing officer]]|}} [[File:Sepan_8.jpg|thumb|left|255px|The Galactic Empire [[Battle of Sepan 8|hoped]] to capture the leaders of Dimok and [[Ripoblus/Legends|Ripoblus]] near [[Sepan 8]]]] The [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]] possessed a small [[Navy/Legends|navy]] that was likely exhausted by their continued [[Sepan Civil War|fighting]] towards the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]]. Their [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] included [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]]. Their starfighter [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] included [[Adam Squadron]], [[Baker Squadron]], [[Bordok Squadron]], [[Elba Squadron]], [[Givin Squadron]] and [[Larkma Squadron]]. Many of their [[Starship/Legends|ships]] were converted [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] craft modified for military duty, such as [[Cargo ferry|cargo ferries]] and [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|CR92a ''Assassin''-class corvettes]]. For [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], they used [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruisers]], such as the ''[[Ben Het]]'' and the ''[[Falaricae]]''. They also had a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] called [[Science Station Youst]] that was defended by Z-95 Headhunters and [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|''Delta''-class JV-7 escort shuttles]]. During the war, the Dimoks once tried to [[First Battle of the Sepan system|stop]] a Ripoblus [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] claiming that they were seizing illegal war supplies. These war supplies included [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] munitions, which could not be acquired legitimately. Ironically enough, the [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Secret Order of the Emperor]] suspected that they were armed by an Imperial, as an [[Priest (Secret Order of the Emperor)|Order member]] noted that their facilities were not capable of producing craft they were using. Their suspicions proved to be the case as Dimok ships were soon discovered to be carrying Imperial munitions and supplies. {{Company-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}} *{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' *''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Planetary governments]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Dimok government]] }}
